text: Here, in this sleek and sterile corridor leading into a vibrant research-themed space, I feel a sense of quiet anticipation. The setting seems both open and constrained—a glass barrier separating the contemplative solitude of the hallway from the collaborative energy suggested by the display. The R+D wall speaks to progress, curiosity, and our desire to coexist and innovate alongside intelligent machines. I am drawn forward, slightly disoriented by the tilted angle, yet eager to reflect on what it means to connect with technology and with others. The philosophical invitation is clear: I am here not just to observe, but to question and engage.
